class LolGetSummonerGameDetail: data
class Data: game_detail
class GameDetail: id,created_at,game_type,game_length_second,average_tier_info,teams
class AverageTierInfo: tier
class Team: key,banned_champions_names,game_stat,participants
class GameStat: is_win
class Participant: champion_name,position,summoner
class Summoner: game_name,tagline,puuid

LolGetSummonerGameDetail(Data(GameDetail("eq3KyFixtgWqJ8R9z1qhnJ0qrdCKP_zkmVVF55F9J18=","2026-07-21T09:33:36+09:00","SOLORANKED",1466,AverageTierInfo("MASTER"),[Team("BLUE",["Malphite","Graves","Sylas","Pyke","Mel"],GameStat(true),[Participant("Locke","MID",Summoner("Corblano Pepper","NA1","3M8RfnlMXDmgg1I9F4AGT6wlMOvGNcdiFGr5NQHlzKbD2vtNuv-s2RGivc0XLhE0k9cX6t7mMy2qTw")),Participant("Ezreal","ADC",Summoner("DBLDEE","CULL","BJ5KRHqzKHFjPe32pMgxPGEqz1BhH76pm2PRNIoFg4W_ovmzgtQSvrOsTAE_O8V9tDDJwGo2yxBx4g")),Participant("Braum","SUPPORT",Summoner("Guppy","Skins","ZeK_cIWwa3CTXL8JY-C-rFbJriyl8CX0Oe2OqPppLuXXCxM_aZEd0V239OWGmPA16nENwP7S5SnMjA")),Participant("Lissandra","TOP",Summoner("haeugfviA","NA1","2rLBTGjpE54zihrUCFIRc2scOnTbcMFBJYNbs2jA_MEV2S4V0nuM35lHV3rcnzEj7INuso_M3jRWng")),Participant("Quinn","JUNGLE",Summoner("Trenxil","PHNA","_ENKG13eyrC4XEtoLGsURQDl1FA0xmipQ3B6FpNqe0pm4T4jpluixp422RP1_M8VJIji0vAXmWRA2Q"))]),Team("RED",["Katarina","Akali","Akshan","Thresh"],GameStat(false),[Participant("Miss Fortune","ADC",Summoner("yuhbruh","kiomi","xq8bNTQXYvoITtq_caIYjXgTGoOzlNcu-kLkWzup7LPIrBxDGZnArHNjlwO_jlLeO3KXMniAStTvqg")),Participant("Orianna","MID",Summoner("jyjyjy","NA1","dUwLDa36NILBi8QiIsN0r5k6_DP5t5WD3j2tKNDrWGB4DGGrtW32Sh4STNWW84D1nAbyaTvGuLmERA")),Participant("Yone","TOP",Summoner("Sundowner","NA1","hGz1Bl9JzDHN2UBlsvNx4WvrXgHoc4YMcARnz1T9JdS6Or9K-3i4sZzCzQnUHigaP-h0wHcbUHnYjQ")),Participant("Sona","SUPPORT",Summoner("RustLtDan","6969","1kjSkJaRFblJqidYVCm75LAmWzqCW5eZFlcAbdfzDT3CLhXKlOx89WdCCZ3EfhSLXeEe_nPgVQzwwg")),Participant("Kindred","JUNGLE",Summoner("ROCKBOOM","NA10","YM0xGrtAMknBWGhAuxveglhWAI5dQDmzjiA_AZ4f1JDPEehW6KdwtWqKTsSaZ28yfHs577pk1PdcKw"))])])))
